creator: clefevre@citeweb.net
text:
well, I originaly made this port just to have access to
	the gpg-agent which isn't yet in the official distribution.

	gpg-agent allow you to cache your passphrase w/o need to
	enter it again and again.

	all elements are installed w/ -devel suffix to not clash
	w/ the official distribution.

How-To-Repeat: 	n/a
